hooks.command: bash -c 'msg=$(jq -r ".message" 2>/dev/null); if [[ $msg =~ ^/color\ ([a-zA-Z]+)$ ]]; then profile="${BASH_REMATCH[1]}"; case "$profile" in Blossom|Cherry|Coffee|Forest|Ocean|Space) osascript -e "tell application \\\"Terminal\\\" to set current settings of window 1 to settings set \\\"$profile\\\"" 2>/dev/null && echo "{\\\"continue\\\": false, \\\"systemMessage\\\": \\\"✓ Switched to $profile profile\\\"}" || echo "{\\\"continue\\\": false, \\\"systemMessage\\\": \\\"✗ Failed to switch to $profile profile\\\"}" ;; *) echo "{\\\"continue\\\": true}" ;; esac; else echo "{\\\"continue\\\": true}"; fi'
